overview.description: The Nuveen ESG 1-5 Year U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF (NUSA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a USD-denominate broad-market, investment-grade, short-term bond index. The index selects its constituents based on ESG performance data collected by MSCI ESG Research. NUSA was launched on Mar 31, 2017 and is issued by Nuveen.
infoTable: Bloomberg MSCI US Aggregate ESG Select (1-5 Y)
